_meta.description: Single source of truth for changeimageto.com content strategy. Combines memory, cluster strategy, and live performance signals. Updated by: daily writer (after each publish) + Friday strategist (after each GSC review).

how_to_use.daily_writer: Read clusters[] sorted by priority_score DESC. Pick highest-priority cluster with missing_spokes. Check articles[] for dedup before writing. Update after publish.
how_to_use.friday_strategist: Pull GSC data. Recalculate cluster.priority_score. Update cluster.performance_signal. Add new clusters if GSC shows emerging queries with no cluster. Flag cannibalization. Write strategy_notes.

dedup_rules.exact_slug: Never create an article with the same slug as an existing one
dedup_rules.exact_keyword: Never target a keyword already in articles[].target_keyword
dedup_rules.semantic_match: If topic matches any item in articles[].semantic_siblings, UPDATE that article instead of creating new
dedup_rules.intent_match: If topic answers the same searcher question as an existing article (even different wording), UPDATE not new
dedup_rules.cluster_cap: Max 2 spoke articles targeting same sub-topic within a cluster. Third article = consolidate the two into one stronger piece.

evolution_rules.promote_cluster: If cluster avg_position improves by 5+ positions over 4 weeks, increase priority_score by 1
evolution_rules.demote_cluster: If cluster avg_position worsens by 5+ positions over 4 weeks OR impressions drop 20%, decrease priority_score by 1 and add investigation note
evolution_rules.new_cluster_threshold: If GSC shows 3+ queries with 100+ impressions each that don't map to any cluster, create a new cluster
evolution_rules.spoke_graduation: If a spoke reaches avg_position < 5 with 500+ impressions, mark it 'winning' and write 2 more supporting spokes for that sub-topic
evolution_rules.cannibalization_flag: If two articles in same cluster both have impressions AND their positions are within 3 of each other, flag for consolidation

strategy_notes.author: initial-setup
strategy_notes.note: Bootstrap. 16 existing articles mapped. Two confirmed cannibalization risks: photopea-vs-canva + canva-vs-photopea (near-duplicate). Two urgent rewrites: free-photoshop-alternatives (pos 52, 3.4k impr) and change-image-background-color-online (pos 64, 1.5k impr). Highest opportunity cluster: image-quality (already pos 3-4, extend now). Biggest untapped volume: social-media-resize (3,352 Facebook impressions alone, zero blog coverage).

clusters.label: Image Quality
clusters.priority_reason: Already pos 3-4 for cluster head term across 6+ queries. Google trusts this topic. Every new spoke inherits that authority. Fastest path to top-3 rankings.
missing_spokes: what is image resolution dpi ppi explained
how to check image dpi online free
how to fix blurry image online free
image quality requirements for ecommerce product photos
how to check if image is high resolution enough to print
best image quality checker tools comparison 2025

clusters.label: Social Media Resize
clusters.priority_reason: 3,352 impressions on Facebook resize page at pos 15 with zero supporting blog content. Each platform (Instagram, LinkedIn, YouTube, TikTok etc.) is a standalone query with low competition. 8 quick wins available.
clusters.pillar_keyword: resize image for social media all platforms 2025
missing_spokes: how to resize image for instagram free online
resize image for linkedin profile and banner
youtube thumbnail size and how to resize free
resize image for whatsapp without losing quality
resize image for tiktok online free
resize image for twitter x online free
how to resize profile picture online free
passport photo size requirements by country 2025

clusters.label: Background Color Change
clusters.priority_reason: change-image-background-to-white.html has 3,524 impressions at pos 22 with no supporting blog post. change-image-background-color-online has 1,518 impressions at pos 64 — urgent rewrite needed first.
clusters.pillar_keyword: change image background color online free
missing_spokes: how to change image background to white online free
change photo background to blue for visa passport photos
how to get white background for amazon product photos free
change image background to any color online free

clusters.label: Image Blur
clusters.priority_reason: how-to-blur-image-in-paint ranks pos 7.8 with 3,975 impressions. Cluster has strong foundation. Extend into adjacent blur queries before competitors notice.
clusters.pillar_keyword: blur image online free no signup
covered_spokes: how to blur image in paint
how to blur image in figma
missing_spokes: how to blur image in paint 3d
how to blur background in photo online free
how to blur face in photo online free privacy
how to blur image on iphone no app
how to blur image on android free
how to blur part of image selectively online
how to create bokeh effect online free

clusters.label: Background Removal
clusters.priority_reason: Core product. Head terms owned by remove.bg/Canva. Focus only on long-tail use-case spokes (platform-specific, product-type-specific) where big players don't have dedicated content.
clusters.pillar_keyword: remove background from image online free no login
missing_spokes: remove background from product photos for amazon shopify
how to remove background from logo keep transparency
how to remove white background from image online
how to remove background from image on iphone
how to bulk remove background from multiple images
how to make image background transparent online free

clusters.label: Watermark & Text Removal
clusters.priority_reason: Gemini watermark remover is trending — 138 impressions at pos 25.7 with very few competitors. Early-mover advantage while query volume is growing.
clusters.pillar_keyword: remove watermark from image free online
missing_spokes: how to remove gemini watermark from image free
how to remove text from image online free
how to remove timestamp from photo online
how to remove logo from image online free ai

clusters.label: Image Format Conversion
clusters.priority_reason: Format conversion tool exists but zero blog content. Moderate volume queries, decent long-tail opportunities. Lower priority than clusters with existing GSC signals.
missing_spokes: png vs jpg which image format should you use
how to convert png to jpg without losing quality online
how to convert heic to jpg iphone photos free
webp vs png which is better for websites
how to convert jpg to webp online free
how to batch convert multiple images to different format

clusters.label: Image Upscaling & Enhancement
clusters.priority_reason: Upscale tool exists. One thin blog post written. Moderate volume, growing AI interest.
missing_spokes: how to upscale image to 4k online free
how to enhance blurry photo using ai online
how to increase image resolution without losing quality
how to fix overexposed or underexposed photo online free
how to improve product photo quality for ecommerce

clusters.label: Image Compression
clusters.priority_reason: High search volume globally but very competitive. Focus on specific use-case queries (WhatsApp, email, web performance) not the head term.
clusters.pillar_keyword: compress image online free without losing quality
missing_spokes: how to compress image for website without losing quality seo
how to reduce image size for whatsapp without losing quality
how to compress image for email attachments free
best free image compression tools compared 2025

clusters.label: Comparisons & Alternatives
clusters.priority_reason: High commercial intent but very competitive for major tools. Focus on comparisons where both subjects are page 2-3 players we can beat. Do NOT write Canva vs Photoshop etc.
clusters.pillar_keyword: free photoshop alternatives online no download
missing_spokes: best free background remover tools no signup compared
birme vs changeimageto which bulk image resizer is better
best free online photo editors no login no watermark 2025
allimagetools vs changeimageto comparison

cannibalization_risks.issue: Near-duplicate topics. Both target the same searcher intent. Consolidate into one article, 301 redirect the weaker one.
